feature1.title: Tsamaiso e Botlhale ya Polokelo
feature1.desc: Lekola dijalo, diruiwa le didirisiwa ka dikakanyo tsa AI

feature2.title: Tlhokomelo ya Pholo kgakala
feature2.desc: Ikopanye le dingaka tsa diruiwa tse di netefaditsweng ka bonako

feature3.title: Maraka o O Lebilweng
feature3.desc: Rekisa dijalo tsa gago ka tlhamalalo go bareki

landing.announcement: Ntiha: Lenaneo la go tsena la pele le a bulegile! Ikopanye le balemi ba le 500+ ba dirisang Farm Aid.

hero.title: Temothuo ya Segompieno, e E Bonolo
hero.subtitle: Go Tlotlofatsa Balemi ka Thekenoloji
hero.description: Farm Aid e gokaganya balemi le ditirelo tsa dingaka tsa diruiwa, diteng tsa maraka, le didirisiwa tsa temothuo tse di botlhale—ka botlhe mo sethaleng se le sengwe.

field.title: Polokelo go ya kwa Marakeng
field.point1: Go lebelela dijalo ka nako ya nnete
field.point2: Dikakanyo le ditlhagiso tsa maemo a bosa
field.point3: Diteng tsa maraka tse di fetogang

footer.description: Go tlhotlofatsa balemi ba Aforika ka thekenoloji le tlhokomelo ya dingaka tsa diruiwa.
